name: dangtran1003/docsmith-v2
description: Documentation skill with markdown intake forms (BA-friendly). Layered config (project + module). Fetches knowledge from Notion/GitHub/Google Drive/URL/files. AI drafts, walkthrough captures screenshots, translates to multiple locales, deploys to Docusaurus. Source change detection via lock file. Re-run safe with KB inheritance, drift detection, and per-block translation review.
author: dangtran1003

skills.name: docsmith
skills.description: Documentation creation, verification, video recording, and deploy to host project (Docusaurus preset)
